programme.title: Naqaab
programme.desc: Sophia, a middle-class girl, gets engaged to a millionaire Karan who dearly loves her. But soon she meets the man of her dreams in Vicky, a struggling but ambitious actor. This love triangle causes twists and turns which leave their lives rattled.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: Undercover agent Wali Khan and his team target D-Company's leader, Goldman. Facing betrayals and danger, they stage a bold escape into India, reshaping the underworld's power dynamics.

programme.title: Ek Chalis Ki Last Local
programme.desc: Nilesh is a call centre executive who misses his last local train at 1:40 am. He meets Madhu, who also misses the train. Since there is an auto strike, they decide to take a walk. The duo then attend a bar that changes their life upside down.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
